summary: The revision-state repair candidate is source-faithful for this lane. Its proposed update keeps the D+Q bone RCT extraction-refresh candidate in needs_revision and attributes that state to the existing open extraction-fidelity and safety-limitations findings without promoting or changing underlying evidence records.

findings.claim_or_issue: The repair candidate states that the extraction-refresh candidate should remain in needs_revision because linked extraction-fidelity and safety-limitations reviews still have open major findings.
findings.why_it_matters: The source-fidelity lane requires the lifecycle repair to be grounded in existing review records rather than introducing an unsupported status change.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the target candidate in needs_revision until the open major extraction-fidelity and safety-limitations findings are resolved.

findings.claim_or_issue: The repair candidate proposes only review-state bookkeeping and does not promote, apply, or mutate underlying study, source, outcome, result, or finding records.
findings.why_it_matters: A missing-lane repair should not expand the scientific change set or bypass unresolved review findings.
findings.recommended_action: Accept the source-fidelity lane for this bounded repair and leave promotion decisions to a later fully reviewed candidate.
